title: Item Every Minute
description: Gives every players one random Item every minute making a fun game wich should play with friend for more fun.
body:
![How It Might Look](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e5057db6ae54f43c53ff3f316ac054fc075afc8.png)

**With this plugin you will get one completely random item every minute and a fun way to use this plugin is to play it with friends on a one block void world and see how good your base will become and how far you can progress.**

**Commands:**

/startgame (starts the game)

/stopgame (stops the game)
